description_long: This is a sealed retail package of Faragello Frozen Okra, featuring a predominantly white background with a vibrant red Faragello logo at the top center of the front face. The front displays a bowl filled with green okra pieces, with both English and Arabic text indicating the product name. The back of the package contains detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and multilingual product descriptions. The sides of the package are narrow and show a continuation of the okra imagery and some branding elements. The packaging appears to be made of flexible plastic, typical for frozen food products, and is designed to be lightweight and easy to handle.
description: A white, flexible plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Okra with a red logo and green okra imagery, featuring nutritional and product information on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and a bowl of green okra pieces.
description_view_1: The left side view is very narrow, showing only the edge of the packaging with partial graphics and text.
description_view_2: The back view displays nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual product information, with a small Faragello logo.
description_view_3: The right side view is also narrow, showing the edge of the packaging and some partial text and graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white Faragello logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a stylized 'F' and the brand name in bold letters.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package shows green okra pieces and the text 'Frozen OKRA' in English and Arabic, indicating the product is plain okra.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
